  <title>Release notes from gepa</title>
  <updated>2026-07-15T14:44:09Z</updated>
  <entry>
    <id>tag:github.com,2008:Repository/1032419366/v0.1.4</id>
    <updated>2026-07-15T14:50:58Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://github.com/gepa-ai/gepa/releases/tag/v0.1.4"/>
    <title>v0.1.4</title>
    <content type="html"><p>This release ships the reflection-LM protocol and batch-based parallel proposals ([<a href="https://github.com/gepa-ai/gepa/issues/329" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/gepa-ai/gepa/issues/329/hovercard">RFC #329</a>](<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4246042399" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/gepa-ai/gepa/issues/329" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/gepa-ai/gepa/issues/329/hovercard" href="https://github.com/gepa-ai/gepa/issues/329">#329</a>), Phases 1 &amp; 4) — the largest change to GEPA's proposal machinery since the project started, contributed by <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/Benzhang2004/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/Benzhang2004">@Benzhang2004</a> in <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4591236369" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/gepa-ai/gepa/issues/369" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/gepa-ai/gepa/pull/369/hovercard" href="https://github.com/gepa-ai/gepa/pull/369">#369</a> and hardened through five review rounds. One breaking change is called out under <strong>Breaking &amp; upgrade notes</strong>.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="pip install -U gepa"><pre>pip install -U gepa</pre></div>
<h2>Highlights</h2>
<ul>
<li><strong>Multi-proposal iterations via composable strategies</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4591236369" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/gepa-ai/gepa/issues/369" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/gepa-ai/gepa/pull/369/hovercard" href="https://github.com/gepa-ai/gepa/pull/369">#369</a>): each iteration can now sample and evaluate many candidate proposals instead of one. <code>sampling_strategy=</code> chooses the (parent, minibatch) tasks — <code>SingleMutationSampling</code> (default, classic GEPA), <code>SameParentSampling(n)</code>, <code>IndependentSampling(n)</code>, <code>PxNSampling(p, n)</code> — and <code>selection_strategy=</code> decides which improvements enter the pool: <code>AllImprovements</code> (default), <code>BestImprovement</code>, <code>TopKImprovements(k)</code>. Defaults reproduce previous behavior exactly (pinned by replay tests against a recorded pre-change run). Full guide: [<a href="https://gepa-ai.github.io/gepa/guides/parallel-pr
